Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: It's a blast from the past when project Fast Lane finally sings.
Video.title: The Ice Horse

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: It's the start of our all new MuscleTrux series and to kick it off, Ford versus Chevy.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 1

Video.summary: Bowtie boy Ryan's got a big play for using big displacement to make big power for his entry.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 2: 1990 Chevrolet 454 SS

Video.summary: It's Blue Oval boy Kevin's turn to take over the shop.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 3: 1994 Ford Lightning

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: Ryan returns fire as his 1990 Chevy 454 SS also gets dropped down into the weeds.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 5

Video.summary: It's a chassis dyno shootout to see what kind of power our sport trucks are making.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 6

Video.summary: It's finally time to lay it on the line as we put the two trucks in head to head competition.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 7

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel roll an Hurst Olds into the shop and begin adding thunder back into this classic.
Video.title: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Image.alt: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Video.summary: We restore a '83 Hurst Olds retro rocket’s finish to a showroom shine.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 02

Video.summary: Grease and gears begin to fly as we swap out our 307 engine for one built in shop of Joe Mondello.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 03

Video.summary: We wire up and cool off our Mondello big-block to take the Hurst's performance from worst to first.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 04

Video.summary: We transform a Chevy C-1500 into a pro-touring sport truck.
Video.title: Pro Touring Sport Truck

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc are under a 2008 Ford Crown Vic police cruiser to add some high pursuit performance.
Video.title: Crown Vic

Video.summary: This classic build brings together the MuscleCar guys and UFC President Dana White for Project Street Fighter.
Video.title: Street Fighter

Video.summary: This project will result in a diesel rig by combining both old and new, Dodge chassis and Ford cab.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 1

Video.summary: We'll straighten out our 1997 Dodge frame before setting our 1979 Ford F-350 body on it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Video.summary: We're modifying our 1997 Dodge frame before bolting our 1979 F-350 body to it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Video.summary: Super Dually gets a coating of sound insulation and spray-on bed liner.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Video.summary: Project: SuperDually gets new a new steering shaft, headlights and under hood paint.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 8

Video.summary: We're adding a water/methanol kit to a '05 Dodge Ram 2500 diesel and a cold air kit to Project Super Dually.
Video.title: Diesel Power Upgrades

Video.summary: Project Super Dually gets a new interior and bumpers!
Video.title: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Video.summary: Performance upgrades on our 6.7L Ram continue with install of larger intercooler, & gauges.
Video.title: Ram 3500 Stage One: Gauges & Intercooler

Video.summary: The Ram 1 ton dually gets a bigger badder turbo setup with more airflow for more horsepower. Plus, Advanced P
Video.title: Ram Diesel Turbo Swap & Exhaust

Video.summary: We've up'd the horsepower of our 2016 Ram dually with the air side of things, now onto fuel.
Video.title: Ram Diesel Fuel System Upgrades

Video.summary: Ever wonder how a performance transmission can withstand 800 horsepower?
Video.title: Ram 3500 Bullet-Proof Transmission

Video.summary: Final top end mods, rear locker & traction bars installed before our 1 ton dually hits the strip.
Video.title: Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually

Image.alt: Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually
Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually
Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually

Video.summary: Judgement day for our Ram dually on both the dyno and dragstrip.
Video.title: Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel

Image.alt: Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel
Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel
Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel

Video.summary: LT and Austin start the teardown process and make some upgrade decisions for Project Lo ‘n Slo.
Video.title: ’65 Chevy C10 Teardown

Video.summary: The '65 C10 Fleetside gets a coilover conversion that will slam her to the ground!
Video.title: Lo'n Slo Suspension

Video.summary: We buy a ’02 Sierra on the cheap and turn it into a reliable, powerful daily driver.
Video.title: GMC Sierra Old School Build

Video.summary: We trash the factory Gov-lock rear for a true posi to get both tires spinning.
Video.title: Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra

Image.alt: Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra
Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra
Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra

Video.summary: After a year in the shop, the turbo powered 292 straight-six is broken in and hits the road and the track.
Video.title: ’65 C10 Wrap Up

Video.summary: Our C10 project breaks tradition by ditching its rotted wood bed floor for an easy install aluminum kit.
Video.title: Installing an Aluminum Bed Floor Kit in a Chevy C10

Image.alt: Installing an Aluminum Bed Floor Kit in a Chevy C10
Installing an Aluminum Bed Floor Kit in a Chevy C10
Installing an Aluminum Bed Floor Kit in a Chevy C10

Video.summary: Dragonali’s Duramax gets a lift pump to handle higher horsepower.
Video.title: Duramax Diesel Fuel Upgrades for High Performance

Image.alt: Duramax Diesel Fuel Upgrades for High Performance
Duramax Diesel Fuel Upgrades for High Performance
Duramax Diesel Fuel Upgrades for High Performance

Video.summary: LT and Austin drop in a boosted 292 six cylinder in the '65 C10 Project Low-n-Slo.
Video.title: Boosted Straight Six Installed in the ’65 C10

Boosted Straight Six Installed in the ’65 C10
